tickets.description:
Created Jira Agent for listing the Jira tickets as per user query. Tested using CrewAI and. Dify.

Things Done -

* User needs to set up using their credentials.
* User can pass the number of days for which they want to look into the tickets
* User will pass query and will receive the specific tickets details as response matching with query



Things to do -

* Create, Update operation

Created servicenow tool both on dify and crewai. It will list all the available incidents and tasks related to an account.

To do -

* Create an account
* Try performing create and Update operation
